attributes.title: [RabbitMQ OTel] Nodes
attributes.description: Node-level resource monitoring: memory, disk, file descriptors, sockets, Erlang processes, connections, and channels. Requires node-level metrics to be enabled in the receiver configuration.

Node-level resource monitoring:
- Memory and disk utilization (alarms block producers when triggered)
- File descriptor and socket usage
- Erlang process utilization
- Connection and channel activity
- Requires node-level metrics enabled in receiver config
